title: More Ender Pearls
description: With the more Ender Pearls mod, you can craft all sorts of ender pearls! Ones that explode, ones that bring you with them, ones that swap your position with an enemy, and more!
body:
With the more Ender Pearls mod, you can craft all sorts of enderpearls! Ones that explode, ones that bring you with them, ones that swap your position with an enemy, and more!

I made this mod over 10 years ago for 1.6.4 forge, and now I have re-created it for newer versions of minecraft!

 

Currently it is available for **1.12.2 Forge**, **1.20.6 forge**, and **1.20.6 NeoForge**.
 

What pearls does it have?

 
## Harmless Ender Pearl

This ender pearl won't damage you when it lands!

## Deadly Ender Pearl

This ender pearl deals 12 damage to any entity it hits, then teleports you so you can finish the job!

## Explosive Ender Pearl

Creates an explosion where it lands, right before teleporting you! Teleport in destructive style!

## Fire Ender Pearl

This ender pearl creates a flame explosion where it lands, much like a ghast fireball! It briefly gives you fire resistance as well, so that you won't be hurt by your own flames.

## Swap Ender Pearl

When it hits any mob, this ender pearl will swap it's position with yours!

## Fetch Ender Pearl

You can use this enderpearl to fetch entities, both mobs and items! Is an item out of reach? Just toss this ender pearl at it!

## Transport Ender Pearl

When you toss this ender pearl, you fly with it! If you don't like where you are about to land, you can toss another one! This powerful pearl can only be crafted using saddles.

## Fast Ender Pearl

This ender pearl flies through the air at wild speeds, allowing you to get out of trouble almost instantly!

## Slender Pearl

When I was younger, I always used to call ender pearls "slenderpearls" instead for fun. This would annoy a guy who would always correct me saying "They are not slender pearls! It's called an ender pearl!".

In honor of that, when re-creating this mod I decided I wanted to create a pearl called the Slender Pearl. This one has the craziest effect I could think of.... you'll have to wait and try it for yourself!!!

 

I hope you enjoy this mod! If you do, feel free to check out my other mods, including Call to Battle, a complete WW2 conversion mod for minecraft. =)
